name: CheckSmart
description_short: Taylor, MI CheckSmart at 26150 Eureka Rd offers check cashing and payday loans with convenient weekday and Saturday hours.
description_long:
CheckSmart in Taylor, MI is located at 26150 Eureka Rd, a standalone check-cashing facility serving the Taylor community. This location operates extended hours Monday through Thursday from 9AM to 7PM, Friday 8AM to 7PM, and Saturday 9AM to 4PM, closed Sundays. The store is easily accessible for Taylor residents and nearby communities needing quick check cashing services.

This CheckSmart location in Taylor specializes in check cashing, payday loans, and cash advance services. Call +1 734-946-0672 to discuss your needs or to ask about rates and terms for loans in the Taylor area. The staff can explain eligibility requirements and help you choose the right financial service for your situation.

If you're a Taylor resident needing quick cash or check cashing services, bring a valid government-issued photo ID, Social Security Number, and recent utility bills if applying for a loan. CheckSmart has been serving customers across Michigan for years, providing fast, accessible financial solutions when you need them most.
pros: Multiple Ohio locations including five in Columbus metro area alone
Online appointment scheduling available to speed up in-store loan process
Extended Friday hours (8:00 AM – 8:00 PM) and Sunday availability (11:00 AM – 5:00 PM)
Green Dot® Visa® Debit Card available for purchase in-store
Gift card exchange for cash — converts unused gift cards to spendable money
Full-service financial hub: check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill pay under one roof
In-person staff assistance throughout the loan application process
cons: CheckSmart is not the actual lender — loans come from an undisclosed unaffiliated third party, so terms and APRs are unknown before you visit
Ohio-only physical presence; no service available outside the state
No loan rates, fees, or APR ranges published on the website — zero cost transparency
In-person visit required; no fully online application or funding path
Limited Saturday hours (9:00 AM – 4:00 PM) may be inconvenient for working borrowers
best_for: Ohio residents who need check cashing, money orders, or wire transfers in person
Underbanked consumers who prefer face-to-face guidance when applying for a short-term loan
People who need to exchange unused gift cards for cash
Consumers who want a single storefront for multiple basic financial services
diagnosis: CheckSmart is best suited for Ohio consumers who want in-person financial services — especially check cashing, money orders, and wire transfers — and may also need a referral to a short-term lender. The key caveat: CheckSmart does not lend its own money; it connects customers to an unaffiliated lender whose rates and terms are not disclosed upfront, so borrowers must ask about the actual loan cost before committing.
services: Green Dot® Visa® Debit Card (in-store purchase)
Short-term loan access via third-party lender
Online appointment scheduling for in-store visits
meta_description: CheckSmart at 26150 Eureka Rd, Taylor, MI. Fast check cashing and payday loans with extended weekday hours.
